overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Last of Us Part II depicting two characters exploring an overgrown post-apocalyptic urban environment. The characters walk through abandoned streets with derelict vehicles, transition from cracked pavement to grassy terrain, and approach a large red industrial building with shipping containers.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown cracked pavement with abandoned vehicles

agents.ego_description: following the companion character across broken rocky terrain toward grassy areas

notable_agents.action: walking ahead leading the way through the overgrown street

derelict white sport utility vehicle partially covered in vegetation
yellow painted fire hydrant visible among the grass
tall evergreen trees lining the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a third-person view following two characters through a post-apocalyptic urban environment. The ground consists of cracked rocky pavement transitioning to grass, with an abandoned white SUV visible to the left. The companion character walks ahead in the center distance, leading the way through the overgrown terrain under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned street with overgrown grass and derelict vehicles

events.description: transitioning from cracked pavement onto fully overgrown grassy terrain
character slows slightly while navigating around abandoned vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass past abandoned vehicles while following the companion

notable_agents.action: continuing to lead the way through the grassy field

entered.detail: derelict four-door sedan partially buried in grass
concrete highway overpass covered in vegetation ahead
ambulance or delivery van with red and white stripes
large white box trailer with blue stripes parked on the right

segments.scene_description: The characters move through tall grass covering the former street, passing the white SUV and approaching an overpass bridge. The environment features multiple abandoned vehicles including a sedan and a large trailer. The companion maintains a steady pace ahead as they navigate the overgrown urban landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass area with abandoned trailer and industrial building

events.description: passing under the concrete overpass into a darker sheltered area
companion stops and looks around near the MOL building entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the industrial building while following the companion who stops to survey the area

notable_agents.action: stopping near the building entrance to look around cautiously

entered.detail: large red industrial building with MOL signage covered in ivy

segments.scene_description: The characters pass under the overpass into a more enclosed area with the large red MOL industrial building coming into view ahead. The companion stops near the building to look around while the player character approaches. An abandoned trailer sits prominently on the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial building exterior with shipping containers

events.description: companion resumes walking and jogs ahead briefly along the building
turning left to follow the building wall with shipping containers

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial building exterior following the companion who runs ahead

notable_agents.action: running ahead along the building wall then slowing to a walk

entered.detail: blue and white shipping containers stacked near the building
large white box truck with open cargo area

segments.scene_description: The characters proceed along the side of the red industrial building, passing shipping containers and abandoned trucks. The companion runs ahead briefly before slowing down. The environment is darker and more enclosed against the building wall, with various industrial debris and containers lining the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an overgrown urban wasteland that transitions from an open, derelict street into a confined industrial corridor. It begins by following two characters across cracked rocky pavement and patches of grass, passing an abandoned white SUV under a heavy, overcast sky. As they move deeper into the greenery, the camera tracks them past a sedan and a large trailer toward the shadow of an overpass bridge. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed space as they pass under the bridge, bringing a massive red industrial building and a prominent abandoned trailer into view. Finally, the camera follows the characters along the side of the building, weaving through a darker path lined with shipping containers and industrial debris.
